meaning: 设菲尔德[英国英格兰北部城市]
examples: The canal was built to connect Sheffield with the Humber estuary.
Then I came back, moved to Sheffield, and have been working with Latimer Engineering since then.
Please ask Tom to inform Sheffield that he may need their stand-ins in case of emergency during the next week.
Meanwhile, Johnson says he still expects Michael McIndoe to complete a move to Sheffield United.
Northern Rail serves many cities, including Manchester, Liverpool, Preston, Hull, Leeds, Sheffield, York, Carlisle and Newcastle.
